## What changed

Describe the user-visible and technical changes.

## Why

Explain the problem or opportunity this addresses.

## Verification

- [ ] Backend tests pass (`pytest -q`)
- [ ] Frontend build passes (`npm run build --prefix frontend`)
- [ ] New behavior has tests
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots

## Operational review

- [ ] No schema change
- [ ] No new environment variable or secret
- [ ] No billing or credit-ledger change
- [ ] No security, privacy, rights, or voice-consent impact

If a box above is not true, explain the impact and rollout plan here.
